notes: All three widths (375/393/900px) render a single quiet column, Apple-native styling, no horizontal scroll or clipped content — including the tightest 375px shot.

No match/event names truncated in a way that hides key info: '100 Thieves – Ninjas in Pyjamas', 'Strømsgodset – Lyn', 'AWS Hungarian Grand Prix', 'NM friidrett 2026 (Trondheim)' all wrap cleanly and stay fully readable at every width.

Every visible event shows a 'where to watch' channel and all are Norwegian-available: TV 2 Play, Kick (StarLadder, gratis offisiell strøm), BLAST.tv (gratis offisiell strøm), NRK, HBO Max (Sport), Viaplay — no foreign broadcasters (no FOX/ESPN/Sky) seen.
Times sensibly formatted (13:00, 15:00, 18:00, 19:30); multi-day date ranges ('23.-25. juli', '23.-26. juli') and stage context ('neste: Etappe 16 · 6 etapper') read clearly.
Must-see accent dot used sparingly — only on the two 100 Thieves rows and the 3M Open row, not on every event.
Header (wordmark, date, theme toggle), day headings, 'Neste opp' block, 'Dette dekker vi' disclosure, and footer (usage/AI-budsjett line) all intact and aligned across all three widths.
No broken image icons or empty boxes observed; the design does not use flags/crests in the agenda rows, so there was nothing broken to flag there.
Only the default light theme was checked (screenshot.js defaults to light unless --dark is passed, matching the prompt's exact commands) — dark/true-black theme was not assessed this run.
